pi_items.source: FITS header TELESCOP ('ESO-VLT-U1') and INSTRUME ('FORS1') keywords in downloaded Vcomb.fits from esahubble.org.
FITS header 'HIERARCH ESO OBS TARG NAME' = 'NGC6218-Q1' (NGC 6218 is Messier 12) and esahubble.org download URL.
setup_task.sh instruction generation and export_result.sh read path.
setup_task.sh script ground truth evaluation logic (rms < 1.5) and generated instructions.
setup_task.sh script generated instructions explicitly require >=5 stars.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real observational data of Messier 12 (NGC 6218) from the ESO Very Large Telescope (VLT) downloaded from esahubble.org. The required output report path is /home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/alignment_report.txt. The alignment assessment tolerance is 1.5 pixels, and the task requires measuring at least 5 stars, both confirmed via the setup_task.sh script.
